learn.core_idea: Auditability means proving correctness from trace evidence, not only final pass/fail status.
mechanism_steps: Explain pass outcome from concrete trace facts.
learn.worked_example: A successful audit run includes required trace events plus fs_ok and completion.
common_mistakes: Relying on one panel instead of full evidence.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can list required events before submit.
I can verify fs_ok and completion together.
I can explain why run should pass.
